mnemonics: LANs PANs, MANs WANs, Get Your Network On
keyPoints: LAN (Local Area Network) covers a small geographic area like a building.
WAN (Wide Area Network) spans a large geographic area, often a country or continent.
PAN (Personal Area Network) is for personal devices within a very short range (e.g., Bluetooth).
commonMistakes: Thinking the internet is a WAN (it's a network of networks, an internetwork).
Confusing a MAN (Metropolitan Area Network) with a large LAN or a small WAN.
